title: Metals fall following mixed economic data in China
section_path: Metals fall following mixed economic data in China
section_path_text: Metals fall following mixed economic data in China
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Disappointing economic data weighed on sentiment across the commodities complex. A stronger USD also kept investor appetite low. Copper extended recent losses after economic data in China missed expectations.
